questions: world er best museums ki ki
Bangladesh er museums ki ki ache
museum e ki ki dekhte pai
answers: Museums are institutions that collect, preserve, and display objects of historical, scientific, artistic, or cultural significance. They educate the public and preserve heritage for future generations.
Museum holo emon place jekhane history, art, science er important jinish preserve ar display kora hoy. Louvre, British Museum, Smithsonian — pothobir famous museums.

Top museums include the Louvre (Paris), British Museum (London), Smithsonian (Washington DC), MoMA (New York), and Hermitage (St. Petersburg). In Bangladesh, the National Museum in Dhaka is a must-visit.

Many museums offer virtual tours — Google Arts & Culture lets you explore thousands of museums online. When visiting in person, wear comfortable shoes, go on weekday mornings to avoid crowds, and check for free admission days.
